query: SHOW COLUMNS FROM users LIKE 'passwordHash'; SELECT id, email, loginMethod, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN passwordHash = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE 'HAS_VALUE' END as hashStatus FROM users WHERE loginMethod = 'email' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
